title: lonchocarpus nicou var. urucu
intro: Lonchocarpus nicou var. urucu is a plant species that is native to the Amazon rainforest and is commonly known as the Urucurana tree or Urucuri plant. The bark and sap of this plant have been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus nicou var. urucu include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed for their medicinal and therapeutic effects.
